CONTENT.Club career: Perrin made his professional debut on 24 September 2019 in a Ligue 1 game against Dijon. He started the match and played the full 90 minutes in a 0–0 away draw.On 30 June 2020 he extended his contract with the club.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 19 May 20241Includes Coupe de France.

SUMMARY: Lucas Perrin (born 19 November 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg.
